segments.text: Is this a logo or this or this? Yes, but they're all different types. There are three main types of logos. Let's see what makes them different. First, you
have the logo marks. They use a simple image or a symbol. Think Apple's apple or the Twitter word. No words needed. And this also a logo mark, right?
Actually, no. This is completely different. Whenever you see the logo written in words, that's actually a word mark. It basically comes when you play with the fonts like Google, Netflix,
like this, this, they all are word marks. But here's my personal favorite,
the mascot logo. This is when a character becomes the face of your brand. The Pringles guy or the KFC colonel. So cool.
